achievements.title: Ghostbusters
achievements.description: In level 3 of Mario's minigame, hit Boo 8 consecutive times without missing (Luigi's shots count only if they hit)
achievements.author: UnsolidSnake

achievements.title: Starstruck
achievements.description: In level 3 of Luigi's minigame, smash a star after hitting at least 7 consecutive stars without missing
achievements.author: UnsolidSnake

achievements.title: Treasure Fever
achievements.description: In level 3 of Wario's minigame, hit a treasure chest after hitting at least 3 consecutive items without missing
achievements.author: UnsolidSnake

achievements.title: Medallion Jackpot
achievements.description: In level 3 of Waluigi's minigame, score at least 500 points by hitting 6 medallions with a single smash shot
achievements.author: UnsolidSnake

achievements.description: Unlock the Warehouse Court

achievements.title: Ace Breaker
achievements.description: Win a game on Break Point with a Return Ace - cannot be done by an AI doubles partner
achievements.author: CobraMJD

achievements.title: Game Aced
achievements.description: In a single session, win a game while scoring with only Service Aces and without losing a point - cannot be done by an AI doubles partner
achievements.author: CobraMJD

achievements.title: Golden Set
achievements.description: In Exhibition Mode, Singles, win a full set of 6 games against a Mario character on Intense without losing a single point or loading a saved game
achievements.author: CobraMJD
